name: French Onion Soup Crock Pot
recipeIngredient: 1 quart beef bouillon or brown stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour bouillon or stock into the crock pot; cover and set on high.
2. Cook onions slowly in a large skillet in butter. Cover and cook for about 15 minutes.
3. Uncover and add salt, sugar, and flour to the onions. Stir well.
4. Add the mixture to the stock in the crock pot. Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours or on high for 3 hours.
5. Before serving, add grated cheese.
